sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, map('a', 2, 'b', 3)), (2, map('c', 1, 'd', 0));
UPDATE test_map SET data = map('e', 1, 'f', 0) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT mapExists((k, v) -> (v > 0), data) AS exists_positive FROM test_map;
SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE mapExists((k, v) -> (k = 'c' AND v = 1), data);
